nasb.text: But they kept on insisting, saying, “He stirs up the people, teaching all over Judea, starting from Galilee even as far as this place.”

esv.text: But they were urgent, saying, “He stirs up the people, teaching throughout all Judea, from Galilee even to this place.”

cnv.text: 但他們極力說：“他在猶太全地教導人，煽動群眾，從加利利直到這裡。”

ccb.text: 但他们坚持说：“这个人从加利利开始一直到这里，在犹太地区四处传道，煽动民心。”

csbs.text: 他们却更加坚持说：“他在犹太全地教导、煽动民众，从加利利开始，一直到这里。”
